description_long: This is a modern floor-standing kitchen base cabinet unit with a sleek black countertop, integrated sink, and faucet. The cabinetry features a series of drawers and doors with small, square knob handles, providing ample storage space. The left section includes a cooktop area, while the right side has a large open compartment, likely for waste or additional storage. The central section beneath the sink reveals plumbing and a cylindrical filter or waste bin, visible when the doors are open. The cabinet is supported by short metallic legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The overall design is minimalist, with a glossy black surface contrasting against the light gray cabinetry.
description: A modern kitchen base cabinet with a black countertop, integrated sink, drawers, and doors, supported by metallic legs. Features a minimalist design with visible plumbing and storage compartments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of drawers, the sink, faucet, and the black countertop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet, the sink, and the open compartment on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with open doors revealing internal plumbing, a cylindrical filter or bin, and storage shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sink and the length of the countertop.
attribute_door_configuration: combination of drawers and double doors
